ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Patient's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Patient's last name */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Patient's date of birth */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "sex" INTEGER /* Sex of the patient (0: female, 1: male) */,
  "admitted" TEXT /* Whether the patient was admitted (Yes/No) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Patient's home address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Patient's contact number */,
  "email" TEXT /* Patient's email address */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Name of the insurance provider */,
  "insurance_id" TEXT /* Insurance ID or policy number */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the patient record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the patient record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical history record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "chest_pain_type" INTEGER /* Type of chest pain (1-4) */,
  "bp" INTEGER /* Blood pressure */,
  "cholesterol" INTEGER /* Cholesterol level */,
  "smoking_status" TEXT /* Smoking status (e.g., non-smoker, smoker, former smoker) */,
  "alcohol_consumption" TEXT /* Alcohol consumption status (e.g., non-drinker, light drinker, heavy drinker) */,
  "diabetes" INTEGER /* Whether the patient has diabetes */,
  "hypertension" INTEGER /* Whether the patient has hypertension */,
  "family_history" TEXT /* Family history of heart disease */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Known allergies */,
  "medications" TEXT /* List of current medications */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the medical history record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the medical history record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_history_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagnostic_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagnostic result record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "fbs_over_120" INTEGER /* Whether the patient's fasting blood sugar is over 120 (0: no, 1: yes) */,
  "ekg_results" INTEGER /* Results of the electrocardiogram (EKG) test */,
  "max_hr" INTEGER /* Maximum heart rate */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the diagnostic test was performed */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor who performed the test */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or observations by the doctor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the diagnostic result record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the diagnostic result record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnostic_results_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnostic_results_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exercise_test_results" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exercise test result record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "exercise_angina" INTEGER /* Whether the patient experienced angina during exercise (0: no, 1: yes) */,
  "st_depression" REAL /* ST depression */,
  "slope_of_st" INTEGER /* Slope of the ST segment */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the exercise test was performed */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor who performed the test */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or observations by the doctor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the exercise test result record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the exercise test result record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exercise_test_results_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exercise_test_results_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "thallium_scan_results" (
  "scan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each thallium scan result record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "number_of_vessels_fluro" INTEGER /* Number of vessels that were scanned using fluoroscopy */,
  "thallium" INTEGER /* Results of the thallium scan */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the thallium scan was performed */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor who performed the scan */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or observations by the doctor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the thallium scan result record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the thallium scan result record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_thallium_scan_results_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_thallium_scan_results_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagnoses" (
  "diagnosis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagnosis record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "diagnosis" TEXT /* Diagnosis (e.g., heart disease, no disease) */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date when the diagnosis was made */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor who made the diagnosis */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or observations by the doctor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the diagnosis record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the diagnosis record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diagnosis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnoses_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnoses_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "doctors" (
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each doctor */,
  "doctor_name" TEXT /* Name of the doctor */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the doctor (e.g., cardiologist, general practitioner) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Doctor's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Doctor's last name */,
  "email" TEXT /* Doctor's email address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Doctor's contact number */,
  "hospital_affiliation" TEXT /* Name of the hospital or institution the doctor is affiliated with */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the doctor record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the doctor record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doctor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Type of treatment (e.g., medication, surgery) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the treatment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the treatment */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor who prescribed the treatment */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the medication (if applicable) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the treatment (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or observations by the doctor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the treatment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the treatment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatments_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id")
)
